name: Bridgecard
description: African card-issuing API for fintechs to build debit/credit/prepaid cards on Visa and Mastercard rails.

seo.title: Bridgecard — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Bridgecard: African card-issuing API for fintechs to build debit/credit/prepaid cards on Visa and Mastercard rails.

when_to_use: Issuing Visa/Mastercard virtual cards for African fintech apps
Corporate expense cards for businesses operating across Africa
Prepaid card programs for African gig economy platforms
Virtual card API for African BNPL or e-commerce cashback products

review.verdict: Viable issuing shortcut for African fintechs who don't want to build BIN sponsorships themselves.
review.best_for: African fintechs launching debit or prepaid cards without principal licensing
review.not_for: Non-African issuers or teams needing global card programs
